case_title: MALLIMSON, GAIL (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) et al VS FENNELL, SHERRELL D.

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MALLIMSON, GAIL (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) MALLIMSON, ELON GOLIGER (MINOR) AS TO DEFENDANT FENNELL, SHERRELL D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FENNELL, SHERRELL D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLIMSON, GAIL (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) MALLIMSON, ELON GOLIGER (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FENNELL, SHERRELL D. $1,441.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,546.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY TO PLAINTIFF GAIL MALLIMSON IN THE SUM OF $741; AND TO PLAINTIFF ELON GOLIGER MALLIMSON, THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM, IN THE SUN OF $700.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAILED TO PARTY.
CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS, FILED. COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING.
